Destroyed sculpture

Abandoned hotel of the ex-JNA, linked to the ruined "Dom JNA". Structure is intact - building was obviously renovated in the nearer past. Supply circuits (water & electricity) seem to be intact, too. Current use is unknown, but it seems to be unused.

tags.description: Collapsed barrack - only base covered with debris is left.
Collapsed barrack - only base covered with debris is left.

Ruined building of the abandoned military base. Roof, windows and floors are missing, walls are decaying. Open access, seems to be safe to enter. Object is overgrown by flora. Base was used as a cistern.

Ruin of the military hospital of National Liberation Army and Partisan Detachments of Yugoslavia ("novj" = "NOV i POJ"), during WW2.  -  Doors, windows & inventory are missing, roof begins to decay. Open access, seems safe to enter.
tags.inscription: Godine 1943 - 44 - U ovoj zgradi je bila bolnica NOVJ. - U Lastovu, 9. IX 1973 - Ovu spomen ploču podiže općinski odbor SUBNOR.
tags.inscription:en: English translation: "In 1943 - 44 - In this building was a hospital [of] novj (= "NOV i POJ" = National Liberation Army & Partisan Detachments of Yugoslavia). - In Lastovo, 9.9.1973 - This plaque was erected by the municipal board of SUBNOR."

tags.description: Ruined outlook of the abandoned naval base. Open access, safe to enter. Door & windows are missing, walls & roof (reinforced concrete) are mostly intact. Could be used as a shelter.
Destroyed small cabin - only rest of walls & base are remaining.
Ruined tiny chapel. Inventory is totally missing, roof begins to decay. Remains of floor-art. Open access, seems to be safe to enter.
Totally collapsed barrack - only debris covered base (concrete) is remaining. Beware of further collapsing and hidden groundholes - watch your step!
Totally collapsed barrack - only debris covered base (concrete) is remaining. Beware of further collapsing and hidden groundholes - watch your step!
